scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,admin,server -c cyan,magenta,green "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix admin" "npm run dev --prefix server"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix admin && npm install --prefix server
scripts.build:admin:subpath: cross-env VITE_BASE=/admin/ npm run build --prefix admin
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:admin
scripts.build:mono: npm run build:client && npm run build:admin:subpath
scripts.start:prod: cross-env NODE_ENV=production SERVE_STATIC=true npm run start --prefix server
